ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER MELINDA AGUILAR'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND PETITION TO THE COURT TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MELINDA AGUILAR'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF AN UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM AND TO APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1281.6, THE COURT NOMINATES THE FOLLOWING FIVE PERSONS AS PROSPECTIVE ARBITRATORS, ALL OF WHOM ARE AFFILIATED WITH ADR SERVICES: 1) INA GYEMANT; 2) EVERETT HEWLETT, JR.; 3) MARGARET KEMP; 4) ALEX SALDAMANDO; AND 5) CHARLOTTE WOOLARD. THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO JULY 14, 2017. IF THE PARTIES FAIL TO AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR, THE COURT WILL CHOOSE THE ARBITRATOR AT THE JULY 14 HEARING. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PETITIONER MELINDA AGUILAR'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF AN UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM AND TO APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER/CLAIMANT MELINDA AGUILAR'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM AND PETITION TO THE COURT TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY MS. AGUILAR STATES THAT THE ALLSTATE WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON AN ATTORNEY, YET THERE IS NO INDICATION THAT THE ATTORNEY IS A REPRESENTATIVE OF ALLSTATE OR THAT THE SERVICE BY MAIL IS PERMISSIBLE. (SEE CCP 1290.4). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MELINDA AGUILAR'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF AN UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM AND TO APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. THE COURT APPOINTS FORMER COMMISSIONER EVERETT HEWLETT JR. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Melinda Aguilar'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Of An Underinsured Motorist Claim And To Appoint An Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Fetto, Esq. (925-482-8178) for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

Petitioner Melinda Aguilar'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Of An Underinsured Motorist Claim And To Appoint An Arbitrator is Granted. The Court appoints former Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MELINDA AGUILAR's Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator. Petitioner Melinda Aguilar's petition to compel arbitration of an underinsured motorist claim and to appoint an arbitrator is granted. No opposition filed. Per Code of Civil Procedure 1281.6, the court nominates the following five persons as prospective arbitrators, all of whom are affiliated with ADR Services: 1) Ina Gyemant; 2) Everett Hewlett, Jr.; 3) Margaret Kemp; 4) Alex Saldamando; and 5) Charlotte Woolard. The hearing is continued to July 14, 2017. If the parties fail to agree on an arbitrator, the court will choose the arbitrator at the July 14 hearing. Moving party to prepare a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Continued To Jul-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Peittion To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Melinda Aguilar's petition to compel arbitration and to appoint arbitrator is once again (as it was on March 24, 2017) taken off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. The proof of service filed by Ms. Aguilar states that the Allstate was served by mail on an attorney, yet there is no indication that the attorney is a representative of Allstate or that the service by mail is permissible. (See CCP 1290.4). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Melinda Aguilar's motion to compel arbitration and to appoint arbitrator is off calendar. After filing this motion, Ms. Aguilar filed the motion again on April 12, 2017 and noticed it to be heard on May 4, 2017. That motion remains on calendar on May 4, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER/Claimant MELINDA AGUILAR's Motion To Compel Arbitration of underinsured motorist claim And Petition To The Court To Appoint Arbitrator is taken off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. The proof of service filed by Ms. Aguilar states that the Allstate was served by mail on an attorney, yet there is no indication that the attorney is a representative of Allstate or that the service by mail is permissible. (See CCP 1290.4). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
